hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Have questions about our treatments? Want to book a consultation? We are here to help. Reach out to us any way that works for you.

visit.title: Visit Us
details: LG 10, Lower Ground Floor, Wisma UOA 2

map.title: Find Us Here
map.imageAlt: Nexus Clinic location map at Wisma UOA 2, Kuala Lumpur

form.title: Book Your Appointment
form.subtitle: Fill in the form below to schedule your consultation. We'll confirm your appointment within 24 hours.

items.q: Do I need an appointment to visit Nexus Clinic?
items.a: Yes, we recommend booking an appointment to ensure our doctors can give you proper attention. Walk-ins are welcome but may have waiting time.

items.q: Is parking available at the clinic?
items.a: Yes, Wisma UOA II has basement parking. We validate parking tickets for patients.

items.q: What is the nearest LRT station?
items.a: KLCC LRT station is a 5-minute walk from our clinic. Ampang Park station is also nearby.

items.q: Can I book a consultation via WhatsApp?
items.a: Yes! You can reach us on WhatsApp for appointments and enquiries.
Yes, we offer virtual consultations for certain treatments. Please contact us to arrange.

items.q: What languages do your doctors speak?
items.a: Our doctors speak English, Bahasa Malaysia, Mandarin, Cantonese, and Tamil.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.description: Book your consultation today and take the first step toward achieving your aesthetic goals.
